task_group.description: Optional few-word code work area for the active task. This is a broad implementation domain, not a specific task detail, progress report, completion summary, or user-visible reply. Correct examples: PDF editing, storefront frontend, order settlement service. Wrong examples: Create a slide deck about the fall of Constantinople in 1453, Add cart button animation, Check order system logs.

status.description: doing only when more command_run calls are required; question when blocked on user feedback; done only when the task is complete, verified, and any media to send/show has been read and inspected.

compact_context.description: Optional context handoff summary. Use only when a new task no longer depends on the current main context or when a context checkpoint is needed. Include only details not already present in the current task conversation or prior summary.
